sources.name: DuReader
sources.notes: Real Chinese search questions with evidence documents and human answers. Check the upstream license before redistributing converted data.

sources.name: Natural Questions
sources.notes: Google search questions with Wikipedia-based annotations. Useful for English QA and cross-lingual ablations.

sources.name: MS MARCO
sources.notes: Bing search queries, passages, and answers. Useful for hard negative construction and retrieval-style evaluation.

sources.name: KILT
sources.notes: Knowledge-intensive benchmark with provenance. Useful for citation/provenance metrics.
